name: VoltTrack
description: VoltTrack is a US-based authorized dealer for the world's leading electric dirt bike brands — Sur-Ron, Stark Future, Talaria, STACYC, Razor, KTM, Segway and more. Founded by US off-road riders, VoltTrack offers honest expert advice, transparent legal and tariff information, fast shipping to the Lower 48, and real post-purchase support.

legal.age_restriction: None (off-road vehicles; local OHV / street-legal rules apply)
legal.compliance: Most vehicles are off-road / private-land use only and not street legal without specific federal/state certification. California: Vehicle Code Section 436.1 OHV registration applies.
